overall.description: First-person exploration through a cyberpunk urban alleyway in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077). The player walks through narrow passages with neon signs, green metal overpasses, and scattered trash, eventually encountering an NPC near a ground mural. The scene features a mix of natural sunlight and artificial neon lighting with high-quality ray-traced graphics.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense cyberpunk district, transitioning from a neon-lit market into a series of claustrophobic industrial alleys before opening into a grim courtyard. It begins in a semi-covered market area past a purple phone booth and an abandoned blue car, moving through scattered trash before turning right into a narrow passage dominated by a green metal overpass and scaffolding. As the camera pushes deeper beneath crisscrossing cables and pipes, the view briefly opens toward a distant glass skyscraper before shifting left into a back alley lined with green dumpsters and a discarded red leather couch. The scene then expands into a courtyard featuring a large circular skull mural where an NPC stands over a body, flanked by an orange industrial building and metal fire escapes. Finally, the camera moves away from the courtyard and deeper into a final service alley filled with trash bags, heading toward the glow of a distant neon billboard.
